coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 16:30. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/11. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:30 at 120-120% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 1:30 at 120%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/11. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/11. 120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/11. You're 24% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/11. 115% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/11. You're building something real here. 9 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/11. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/11. You've accumulated 1min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 5:15 at 110%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28% through session. Rep 3/11. You've done 4min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/11. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/1. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1: 110% for 5:15. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/11. 26 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/11. You're building something real here. 7 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/11. 115% FTP. Keep 85-100 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/11. You're 39% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/11. 1:30 at 120%. Cadence: 85-100 rpm. Seated. 6 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 5/11. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/11. 120% FTP × 1:30. Seated. 6 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/11. 12:45 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 12:45. Then 30min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-100 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 12:45. Then 30min to question life choices.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 58% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 120% for 1:30. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 3min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 58% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 58% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. 120% for 1:30. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 60% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% complete. 115% for 3:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 85-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 28 minutes of hard work. You can do 3 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 3 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% complete. Rep 8/11. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 85-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 2 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9: 110% FTP. You're 48 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48 minutes of work done. 21 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 48 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 2 intervals left. 21 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/11. You're 71% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 10: 115% FTP. You're 53 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 18 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 10/11. You've accumulated 36min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 1:30 at 120%. Empty the tank. You've got 16 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 16 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 1:30 at 120%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 16 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:30 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 120% × 1:30. Then 16min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 57 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 50% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 57 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 77% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 16:30. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
